user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter shift assignments by period, employee class, department, shift and status, so that I can find the assignments I need to manage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Shift Assignment screen; When I set period, employee class, department, shift or status and click Search; Then only matching shift assignments are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to assign a shift to employees, so that I can schedule my team's working hours
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Shift Assignment screen; When I click Assign shift and provide shift, dates and times; Then a new shift assignment is created and appears in the list

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter shift assignments by statuses such as Assigned, Pending with me, Approved, Rejected, Need clarification and Cancelled, so that I can track each assignment's approval stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Shift Assignment screen; When I select the Pending with me status; Then only assignments awaiting my action are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see shift name, from/end dates, from/to times, assigned by and assigned date per record, so that I can review the full assignment detail
acceptance_criteria: Given shift assignments exist; When the grid loads; Then columns for shift assignment ID, shift ID, employee name, employee class, shift name, from date, end date, from time, to time, assigned by, assigned date and status are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to approve, reject or request clarification on a shift assignment via the Task column, so that assignments are confirmed correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given a shift assignment is pending; When I act on the Task column; Then the assignment status is updated to Approved, Rejected or Need clarification

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters and refresh the list, so that I can clear criteria and reload the assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset or Refresh; Then filters clear and the list reloads
